pages.storyText: In the Heart of Sunny Meadow lived Leo the Rabbit and Pip the Squirrel. Leo loved crunchy kale and bright orange carrots, but Pip only wanted to eat 'Neon-Nuggets'—brightly colored, sugary snacks he found in crinkly bags dropped by hikers.
pages.imagePrompt: A vibrant meadow with a brown rabbit named Leo eating a fresh, bright orange carrot and a gray squirrel named Pip holding a bag of neon-pink glowing snacks. The sun is shining, and there are colorful wildflowers everywhere. 3D animated style.

pages.storyText: One afternoon, Pip found a sparkly golden ticket. 'Look, Leo! It’s a map to the Secret Mountain of Marshmallows!' Pip squealed with excitement. Leo frowned. 'That sounds too good to be true, Pip. My carrots give me the power to run, but those snacks just make you sleepy.'
pages.imagePrompt: Pip the squirrel holding a glowing golden map with a drawing of a mountain made of white marshmallows. Leo the rabbit looks skeptical with his paws on his hips. Detailed forest background with tall oak trees and dappled sunlight.

pages.storyText: They began their climb up the rocky trail. Halfway up, Pip started to huff and puff. His legs felt like jelly, and his tummy hurt from all the sugar. Leo, fueled by his healthy greens, hopped effortlessly over logs and stones. 'Wait for me!' Pip gasped, feeling very slow.
pages.imagePrompt: A steep rocky path leading up a mountain. Leo the rabbit is jumping high over a large mossy log with ease. Pip the squirrel is sitting on a rock, looking tired, sweating, and holding his stomach. His snack bag is empty and crumpled.

pages.storyText: Finally, they reached the 'Chocolate Fountain' at the top. It looked delicious! But as Pip reached out for a taste, the ground began to shake. The 'chocolate' wasn't chocolate at all—it was a giant, sticky mud trap covered by a magical illusion projector!
pages.imagePrompt: A dark cave entrance where a shimmering, brown liquid fountain stands. A small technological projector is hidden behind a rock, casting a holographic glow of candy. The 'chocolate' is turning into thick, dark brown mud. Pip is leaning forward, looking surprised.

pages.storyText: Pip slipped and fell into the sticky mud. 'I'm stuck!' he cried. He tried to pull himself out, but his muscles felt weak because he hadn't eaten anything healthy all day. Behind the rocks, a sneaky Fox appeared, grinning. He had set the trap to catch slow, sluggish animals who only ate junk food.
pages.imagePrompt: Pip the squirrel trapped waist-deep in thick, gooey mud. In the shadows of the cave, a sneaky orange fox with a mischievous grin is peeking out from behind a stalagmite. Leo the rabbit is standing on solid ground, looking worried and alert.

pages.storyText: Leo didn't panic. He reached into his backpack and pulled out a long, sturdy stalk of celery he had saved. 'Grab onto this, Pip!' Leo braced his strong legs against a rock and pulled with all his might. Thanks to his healthy diet, his muscles were strong enough to save his friend.
pages.imagePrompt: Leo the rabbit digging his feet into a rock, pulling hard on a long, bright green celery stalk. Pip the squirrel is grabbing the other end of the celery, being lifted out of the mud. The fox in the background looks frustrated as his prey escapes.

pages.storyText: They dashed away from the cave just as the Fox lunged! Leo ran like the wind, and Pip used every bit of energy he had left. They didn't stop until they reached the safety of the vegetable patch. 'The Fox almost got us because I was too slow and weak,' Pip realized sadly.
pages.imagePrompt: Leo and Pip running fast through a dense forest, away from the cave. The orange fox is far behind, tripping over a tree root. The lighting is dramatic, with long shadows and rays of sunlight through the trees.

pages.storyText: From that day on, Pip traded his 'Neon-Nuggets' for walnuts, berries, and crisp apples. He felt faster, stronger, and more awake than ever before. 'You were right, Leo,' Pip said, munching on a delicious red apple. 'Real food is the real magic!'
pages.imagePrompt: Leo and Pip sitting together on a soft patch of grass near a garden. Leo has a pile of carrots, and Pip is happily eating a bright red apple and some walnuts. They both look healthy, energetic, and happy. The sun is setting in a beautiful orange and purple sky.
